register.title: Sign up
register.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

reset.title: Reset password
reset.intro: Enter your account email — we'll send a 6-digit code.
reset.channelHint: Telegram works only if you've linked the bot — otherwise the code goes to your email.
reset.codeLabel: Code from the email or Telegram
reset.codeSentGeneric: If the account exists, we've sent a code.
reset.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
reset.success: Password changed. Sign in with your new password.

verify.title: Confirm your email
verify.intro: We've sent a 6-digit code to your address. Enter it below or follow the link from the email.
verify.codeSent: If the account exists, the code has been sent

join.deadInvite: This invite is invalid, expired, or already used. Ask the owner to send a new one.
join.loadFailed: Couldn't load the invite. Please try again.
join.accessEditor: {{inviter}} is giving you {{role}} access — you'll be able to keep this car's logbook.
join.accessViewer: {{inviter}} is giving you {{role}} access — you'll be able to view this car's logbook.
join.signInPrompt: Sign in or create an account — and you'll see which car you're invited to.
join.afterLogin: After signing in you'll come back here and can accept the invite.

s1.title: Your cars
s1.body: This is your active car. Tap to switch cars or add a new one.

s2.title: Shop details
s2.body: Tap the car name — the VIN, engine and oil approvals copy as a single line. Watch: the icon turns into a checkmark once copied.

s3.title: Mileage
s3.body: The pencil next to the mileage opens the car editor to update the odometer.

s4.title: Key numbers
s4.body: Monthly spending, fuel consumption and cost per kilometre — all calculated automatically from your entries.

s5.title: Tap a service interval
s5.body: When the work is done, tap this interval. The "Completed" form opens, the job is logged to history, and progress resets. A reminder as it comes due arrives in Telegram.

s1.title: Search
s1.body: Find an entry by title, gas station or note.

s2.title: Filters
s2.body: Only fuel-ups, service, repairs or expenses — or all at once.

s3.title: Entry
s3.body: Tap an entry to open its details, photo and editing.

s4.title: Entry details
s4.body: Full information, the attached receipt photo, plus editing and deleting.

s1.title: Entry type
s1.body: Fuel-up, service, repair or expense — each with its own fields.

s2.title: Scanning
s2.body: Photograph a gas-station receipt or a shop work order — amounts, date and line items are recognized automatically.

s3.title: The rest of the fields
s3.body: Mileage is filled in automatically. Complete what you need and save.

s1.title: Forecast
s1.body: Average monthly spending, a forecast for the current month, and upcoming services with an estimated price.

s2.title: Spending by month
s2.body: The "Spending" tab shows a by-month chart and a breakdown by category. The trend is clear at a glance.

s3.title: The "Fuel" tab
s3.body: Here you'll find consumption and fuel price, plus a trip calculator: how much everyone chips in for fuel, based on your car's real consumption.

s4.title: PDF report
s4.body: Your entire service history in a single file — handy as a pre-sale passport. And the "Efficiency" tab shows the cost per kilometre.

s1.title: Your cars
s1.body: Each car: edit, report, delete. Tap the name to copy the shop details.

s2.title: Profile
s2.body: Name, email, password and Telegram linking.

s3.title: Telegram bot
s3.body: Link the bot and service reminders will start arriving in your chat.

s4.title: Notifications
s4.body: This is where you turn on service reminders and the weekly summary.

s5.title: And more
s5.body: Documents, tires, OBD diagnostics, data export — all here on the settings page.

intervals.title: Service intervals
intervals.noCarPrompt: Add a car first — intervals are tracked per car.
intervals.errIntervalRequired: Enter an interval in km or days
intervals.emptyManage: No service intervals yet. Create your own or use a standard set.
intervals.emptyViewer: The owner hasn't added any service intervals yet.

carEditor.errPlateOrVin: Enter a plate number or VIN
carEditor.lookupHint: We'll pull the make, model, year and engine from the MIA registry — and check whether it's reported stolen. VIN works too.
carEditor.stolenWarning: 🚨 This car is reported stolen. Check the details before buying.
carEditor.notesPlaceholder: Gate codes, garage phone, stereo PIN…
carEditor.telegramNote: Quick access from Telegram: the /note command
carEditor.qrHint: Details for the car's public page (service, parking). The QR code is generated in the Garage.

profile.title: Profile
profile.nameHint: This is how you're credited on entries in shared cars. Without a name — {{name}}.
profile.name: Name
profile.telegramHint: Service reminders and quick mileage and expense entries right from Telegram.
profile.unlinkTelegramMessage: Unlink Telegram? The bot will stop sending reminders.
profile.codeExpires: The code is valid for {{minutes}} minutes.
profile.passwordHint: Your current password stops anyone at an open session from taking over the account.
profile.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
profile.untilConfirmed: Until you enter it, sign-in stays on the old address.
profile.sendCodeToNewEmail: Send code to the new email
profile.deleteHint: All your cars, service history, documents, and photos will be permanently gone. This can't be undone. Enter your password to confirm.
profile.deleteForeverMessage: All service history for your cars will be destroyed with no way to recover it.

carSpecs.name: Name
carSpecs.title: Spec sheet
carSpecs.emptyManage: Torque values, fluid capacities and tolerances live here — everything you'd otherwise hunt for on forums from under the hood.
carSpecs.emptyViewer: The owner hasn't filled in this car's spec sheet yet.

logDetail.deleteEntryMessage: Delete this entry? This can't be undone.
logDetail.author: Author
logDetail.noPhotos: No photos for this entry yet.
logDetail.deletePhotoMessage: Delete this photo? This can't be undone.

garage.importNotJson: Could not read the file: it's not JSON
garage.importNotBackup: This file does not look like a Kapot Tracker export
garage.dataDesc: Garage backup: export to JSON and restore from a file. Photos are not included in the export.
garage.importConfirmMessage: Will add: {{cars}} cars, {{logs}} entries, {{intervals}} intervals. Existing data will not change.
garage.diagnosticsDesc: Import a CSV log from Car Scanner: DPF soot, injector corrections, battery voltage.
garage.deleteCarMessage: Delete {{brand}} {{model}}? The entire log will be deleted along with the car.
garage.title: Settings
garage.emptyGarage: Your garage is empty. Add your first car.
garage.toursDesc: Short tours of each section — they show what's where and how it works.
garage.languageDesc: Choose the app language. Emails and Telegram messages follow it too.

yearReview.loadError: Couldn't load your year in review
yearReview.noEntries: No entries for {{year}} yet. Keep a logbook, and you'll get a recap at the end of the year.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.telegramHint: These notifications are also sent via Telegram. Link the bot in your Profile to receive them without the app.

reminders.title: Service reminders
reminders.desc: When an interval is approaching or already overdue

fuel.title: Fuel consumption spike
fuel.desc: If consumption rises more than 15% above your baseline

seasonal.title: Seasonal: tyres and washer fluid
seasonal.desc: Winter tyres and antifreeze washer fluid — by your plate's region

digest.title: Send the digest
digest.desc: Every Sunday — spending, mileage and what's coming up. We won't bother you on an empty week.
digest.label: Digest

dashboard.welcomeSubtitle: Add your first car to start logging expenses and maintenance.
dashboard.addFirstRefuel: Add your first refuel to see your real fuel consumption
dashboard.noIntervalsManager: No service intervals yet. Add them on the intervals page.
dashboard.noIntervalsViewer: The owner hasn't added any service intervals yet.

carPassport.notFound: Passport not found. The link may have been revoked.

logbook.emptyCarBefore: First add a car in the
logbook.confirmDeleteMessage: Delete this entry? This can't be undone.
logbook.noResults: Nothing found for “{{query}}”. Try different words.
logbook.emptyCreate: Your logbook is empty. Add your first entry!
logbook.emptyViewer: This car's logbook is empty for now.

addEntry.loadForDuplicateFailed: Couldn't load the entry to duplicate
addEntry.entryAddedPhotoFailed: Entry added, but the photo didn't upload
addEntry.offlineSaved: No connection — the entry was saved locally and will send later
addEntry.noCarPrefix: To add an entry, first create a car in the
addEntry.viewOnly: You have view-only access to {{car}}, so you can't add entries. Ask the owner to change your role to «{{role}}».

diagnostics.title: Diagnostics
diagnostics.noCarPrompt: Add a car to import OBD logs.
diagnostics.dropHint: Drag a Car Scanner CSV here or click
diagnostics.fileLimit: CSV up to 20 MB · the file itself isn't stored
diagnostics.deleteConfirmMessage: The log «{{filename}}» and its metrics will be deleted. This can't be undone.
diagnostics.howToTitle: How to capture a log in Car Scanner:
diagnostics.howStep1: Connect the ELM327 and start recording during a drive.
diagnostics.howStep3: Select the recording you want and tap Export CSV.
diagnostics.howNote: The more PIDs in the recording profile (DPF soot, injector corrections, voltage), the more insights you'll get here.

sharing.copyError: Couldn't copy. Copy the link manually.
sharing.inviteLinkInfo: Send this link. It's single-use and valid until {{date}}.
sharing.inviteOnceInfo: The link is shown once — after you close this window it can't be recovered, only a new one created.
sharing.viewerAccessInfo: You have access as {{role}}. Another owner keeps this car.
sharing.leaveCarConfirmMessage: Leave {{car}}? The car will disappear from your garage. You can only come back with a new invitation.
sharing.ownerInfo: Who else can see {{car}}. Editors keep the log, viewers only read.
sharing.emptyState: Only you have access. Invite someone who also drives this car with a link.
sharing.removeMemberConfirmMessage: Remove {{name}}? Access to the car disappears immediately, but the journal entries stay.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.noActiveCar: Add a car to see analytics.
analytics.noUpcoming: No scheduled maintenance in the next 90 days.
analytics.noSpendingYet: No spending yet — add records to your logbook.
analytics.fuelSpikeBody: {{consumption}} L/100 km vs the usual ~{{baseline}} ({{date}}). If your driving hasn’t changed, check tyre pressure, filters, and spark plugs.
analytics.notEnoughData: Not enough data. Add at least two full-tank refuels to see consumption.
analytics.stationsHint: Consumption is measured over the legs that start at this station.
analytics.lpgSavingsDetail: Net savings of {{perKm}} ₴ per kilometer · {{distance}} on gas
analytics.tcoExplainer: ₴/km and ₴/day are computed from all costs — fuel, maintenance, repairs, other — divided by the distance driven{{distance}} and days of ownership. This is the honest cost, not just fuel.

passportDialog.title: Car QR passport
passportDialog.description: Point your camera at it — a page opens with the phone number, MTPL insurance, tyre pressure and fuel grade. Print it and keep it in the glovebox.
passportDialog.linkUpdated: Link updated — the old QR no longer works

tripCostCard.title: Trip cost
tripCostCard.filledFromHistory: Filled in from your history — you can change it
tripCostCard.emptyHint: Enter distance, consumption and price — I'll work out the cost and each person's share.

notificationsPanel.empty: No new notifications — everything's under control.

completeInterval.title: Completed: {{title}}

completeInterval.marketHint: Market ballpark — enter your own amount

documentsCard.reminderHint: We'll remind you 14 days before it expires

documentsCard.heading: Documents
documentsCard.empty: Registration, insurance, receipts — on hand and offline. For insurance and inspection with a "valid until" date, we'll create a reminder.

tiresCard.changeoverSummer: Time to switch to summer tyres
tiresCard.washerChangeover: Night frosts are coming soon — top up your washer with winter fluid.
